description: Forced-Selling Bounce Detector. 5-condition V-bottom AND gate: VIX spike + putcall extreme + breadth collapse + OPEX gamma unwind + capitulation posture. 4-of-5 = imminent, 5-of-5 = confirmed. Tactical 2-10 day horizon. Every 30 min US hours.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Forced-Selling Bounce every 30 min during US trading 13-21 UTC
